faqs.question: Why are centipedes common in Eltingville homes?
faqs.answer: Eltingville's proximity to green spaces and older homes with basement-level moisture issues create perfect environments for centipedes. They're attracted to damp areas and enter through foundation cracks, seeking shelter and prey like other small insects.

faqs.question: How much does centipede control cost in Eltingville?
faqs.answer: Our centipede control services in Eltingville range from $350 to $550, depending on the severity of the infestation, property size, and treatment methods required. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work.

faqs.question: Are centipede treatments safe for my family and pets?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use EPA-approved products and modern application techniques that are safe for children and pets when applied by our trained professionals. We'll provide specific safety instructions and can schedule treatments when your family is away if preferred.

faqs.question: How quickly can you eliminate centipedes from my Eltingville property?
faqs.answer: Most customers see dramatic reduction within 24-48 hours of treatment. Complete elimination typically takes 1-2 weeks depending on infestation severity. We include follow-up visits to ensure all centipedes and their food sources are eliminated for long-term prevention.
